archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Elevated to High-Contrast Medical Enterprise)
vibe: Credible, clinical, enterprise SaaS. Serious, trustworthy, structural, and non-generic. Replaces AI-slop gradients with crisp borders, architectural layouts, and data density.

typography.font_setup_instructions: Use Cabinet Grotesk for Headings (serious, authoritative). IBM Plex Sans for UI body text. IBM Plex Mono for clinical codes (ICD/CPT) and data readouts. DO NOT use generic fonts for headings.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Strict geometric layout. The 'Control Room Grid'. Avoid soft shadows completely. Prioritize structural clarity and data density for clinical workflows.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use Tailwind standard with generous padding in outer containers (p-8 to p-12) and dense packing inside data grids (p-3 to p-4).
layout_and_spacing.borders: Rely heavily on 1px solid borders (border-stone-200). Use crisp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-md or rounded-none). No large soft drop shadows.

components.button: Solid colors, crisp edges (rounded-md). Primary: bg-emerald-900 hover:bg-emerald-800 text-white. No shadows. Focus: ring-2 ring-emerald-900 ring-offset-2.
components.card: bg-white border border-stone-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg. Flat, high contrast. Use 'Grid Borders' pattern for dense areas.
components.input_select: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-md shadow-sm text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-900 focus:border-emerald-900.
components.stepper: Horizontal step indicator. Crystal glassmorphism if sticky (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-stone-200 saturate-150).
components.badges: Crisp tags. text-[11px] font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded border. Status colored.
components.tables: Extremely dense. border-collapse. border-b border-stone-200. Table headers are uppercase, tracking-wider text-[11px] text-stone-500 bg-stone-50/80.
components.gauge: Semi-circle SVG or Recharts. Sharp stroke. Color based on probability threshold (emerald-700/amber-500/red-600).

Login.left_panel: Authentic clinical photo covering full height. Cover with bg-stone-900/40 overlay for text readability. Subtle CSS noise texture. Brand/Trust messaging left-aligned, bottom-anchored, white text.
Login.right_panel: Crisp authentication form, horizontally and vertically centered. Clean tabs (Email vs Google). 1px borders, clinical precision.

Dashboard.structure: Bento-style Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6).
Dashboard.greeting: col-span-full md:col-span-12. Sharp, clean typography with left-alignment. NO emerald gradient backgrounds. Keep it on stone-50.
Dashboard.cta_card: col-span-full md:col-span-5. Primary action. Sharp border, white background, button is emerald-900. 'Start a new PA request'.
Dashboard.credit_balance: col-span-full md:col-span-3. Crisp white card, border-stone-200. Big mono typography for number readouts.
Dashboard.how_it_works: col-span-full md:col-span-4. 4-up vertical list or 2x2 grid inside a bordered card. Minimalist lucide-react icons.

Wizard_Capture.structure: Grid of 3 document upload slots (Patient ID, Insurance, Order).
Wizard_Capture.visuals: Use dashed borders (border-stone-300 bg-stone-50) but with clinical precision: add SVG crosshairs (L-shapes) at the 4 corners to give a 'camera overlay' technical feel. Extracted data readout in a right-side panel with mono font.

Wizard_Dictate.visuals: Suggested script in text-stone-400. Bracketed dynamic slots highlighted with bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-900 border border-emerald-200. Voice mic button: circular, crisp border, smooth pulse animation (framer-motion) when active.

Wizard_Validate.structure: HIGH-DENSITY clinical dashboard grid. Strict layout.
Wizard_Validate.details: Payer portal dropdown. ICD-10 to CPT crosswalk matrix in a dense border-collapse table. Show 'Confidence %' using harsh bg-status colored tags. Add 'ambiguous match' warning flags. Modifiers as crisp chips. Urgency toggle.

Wizard_Results.structure: Bento Grid: 4 interconnected panels (grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4).
panels: 1. Technical Analysis: Big approval-probability gauge. Denial-risk badge. Missing items list in red-700.
2. Optimization Suggestions: Ranked list. Use impact badges (e.g., 'High Impact').
3. Filled Form: Dense key/value readouts. Labels text-stone-500, values text-stone-900 mono.
4. Cover Letter: Looks like a structured document. Monospace or Serif preview. Submission routing checklist at the bottom.

image_urls.description: Clean, modern medical examination room. Use for the left split-screen on the login page.
Professional male doctor. Use for trust-building segments if needed.

interactions_and_motion.general: Minimalist micro-interactions. Zero bouncy/springy animations. High-end SaaS feel requires immediate, snappy responses.
interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle border color changes (border-stone-200 to border-stone-400). Slight background darkening (hover:bg-stone-50).
interactions_and_motion.stepper: Smooth width transition on the progress bar.
interactions_and_motion.dictation: Subtle ring pulse for the active microphone using framer-motion.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='submit-pa-btn', data-testid='upload-doc-slot').
